runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.

closureReview.scope: Strict closure review for SKILL.md, test-prompts.json, and audit.json.
changesMade: Added standalone runtime contract and provenance-only policy to SKILL.md.
Added activation/execution gate, output deliverables, recovery/idempotency, and hard rules.
remainingRisks: Reliable CBR behavior still depends on enough evaluated cases and a domain-appropriate similarity relation.

fallback: book2skill+skill-creator-style distillation because cangjie skill is unavailable in this runtime
